title: Insight AI
html:
Yahir's productized AI-visibility funnel under the aeo agency umbrella — free AI-presence-score quiz (built in scoreapp) → competitor compare → tiered upsell ($14.99 DIY / $99 DFY for 1–50 / $500–1000 enterprise). Designed Oct 23 2025 in two evening screenshots, then collided with Peekaboo doing the same thing live the next day. Functions in the timeline as the last B2C-style AEO experiment before Yahir pivoted to the whitelabel agency channel thesis that became Rankett.

TL;DR

  • Designed in two screenshots on 2025-10-23: funnel sketch + dashboard mockup + tiered pricing.
  • Pricing tiers: $14.99 DIY → $99 DFY (1–50 brands) → $500–1000 enterprise. Very B2C-coded compared to Rankett's eventual $998/seat agency model.
  • Also identified as insightsai.com with a "free GEO SEO audit" landing — possible name-collision unresolved.
  • The Peekaboo competitive collision (Oct 24 2025) is the immediate trigger that started Yahir questioning B2C AEO — another team had already shipped the exact funnel.
  • 19 inbound citations — almost entirely from the Sept 22 → Nov 21 2025 AEO Agency operational stretch.
  • Deprecation note: Yahir didn't formally kill Insight AI — it absorbed into Rankett's whitelabel strategy as the lessons-learned that justified pivoting away from end-client direct sales.

Key facts

  • ScoreApp as quiz infra. ScoreApp is the no-code quiz tool that powered the lead magnet.
  • Tiered pricing is the giveaway. $14.99 / $99 / $500–1000 reads as "spray pricing across the funnel hoping something sticks" — the opposite of Rankett's discipline.
  • Peekaboo collision. Documented across 2025 10 24 screenshot 2025 10 24 at 4 15 22 am f3a7573c / Peekaboo entity — "found Peekaboo doing this exactly, 4 a.m., reckoning."
  • Carried infra into Rankett. The audit-tool concept survived the pivot — became the whitelabel-able audit in rankett.
  • Same-week as the strategic shift. 2025 10 04 where are we right now (state-of-business) and 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 2 03 36 am a0ae9d76 bracket the Insight-AI experiment window.

Chronological arc

  • 2025-09-22 → 2025-10-04 — AEO Agency operational stretch precursor.
  • 2025-10-23 — Insight AI designed in two evening screenshots.
  • 2025-10-24 — Peekaboo collision, 4 a.m. reckoning.
  • 2025-10-28 → 2025-11-21 — operational continuation but momentum shifting toward whitelabel.
  • 2025-12 → 2026-01 — Rankett crystallizes; Insight AI absorbed as the lesson.

Source summaries

  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 33 39 pm 5fd5798f — funnel sketch
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 34 12 pm 6ff06ea0 — dashboard mockup

  • 2025 10 24 screenshot 2025 10 24 at 4 15 22 am f3a7573c — Peekaboo collision

  • 2025 11 12 screenshot 2025 11 12 at 11 15 05 am 7b17ccaa
  • 2025 11 15 screenshot 2025 11 15 at 1 07 04 pm ccf72602

Plus ~9 additional screenshots from Nov 2025 operational continuation.

Connections

  • aeo agency — parent project
  • rankett — successor project that absorbed the lessons
  • peekaboo — competitive collision that triggered the pivot
  • scoreapp — quiz infra
  • ai visibility engine · ai search optimization · share of voice · schema markup for ai · llm txt — domain
  • whitelabel strategy · 60 day activation rule — the strategy that replaced Insight AI's approach
  • chatgpt · gemini · perplexity · anthropic claude · google ai overviews — target surfaces
